ham.subject: Scheduled Security Update – 2:00 PM BST
ham.body:
Hi Team,

This is a heads‑up from IT Security: a critical security patch will be deployed automatically to all company workstations at 2:00 PM BST today. The update resolves recent vulnerabilities in the web browsing and email clients.

No action is required from you; the systems will reboot automatically, and normal operations will resume shortly afterward. If you have any questions or experience problems post‑update, please reach out via the Helpdesk portal: <URL>

Thank you for staying vigilant.

— IT Support

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Account Has Been Compromised
spam.body:
Dear User,

Our system has detected suspicious activity on your corporate account. To prevent permanent suspension, you must verify your identity within the next 24 hours.

Click here to confirm your credentials: <URL>

Failure to comply will result in a complete account lock and all associated data will be deleted. If you believe this is a mistake, contact IT Security immediately at <URL> or call 1‑800‑555‑0123.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

— Corporate Security Team
